system.skills:
S: | T: | Ag:
Int: Common Lore (Ecclesiarchy, Imperial Creed), Scholastic Lore (Imperial Creed)
Per: Awareness
WP: Command +10
Fel: Charm +10, Intimidate

description.value:
Ministers of the Ecclesiarchy, Ministorum Priests tend to the spiritual needs of the Imperial populace. They range from quiet scholars to firebrand zealots. Many accompany Imperial Guard regiments or serve as confessors to the faithful in hive cities.

Tactics: Priests are rarely alone — they are surrounded by faithful followers who will fight and die at their command. In combat, a priest inspires nearby allies with fiery rhetoric, granting them bonuses to Willpower tests. They fight with righteous fury, charging into melee with warhammers or chainblades.
